---
title: "Scenario: Metabolomics Analysis"
description: >
  Version-controlled metabolomics workflow from feature tables to pathway analysis
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
```

## Overview

Metabolomics analysis involves peak detection, alignment, annotation, normalization, and statistical analysis. Decisions at each step (e.g., intensity thresholds, annotation databases, normalization methods) affect downstream results. OmicsLake captures these decision points.

## Setup

```r
library(OmicsLake)
lake <- Lake$new("metabolomics_project")
```

## Step 1: Import Feature Table

```r
# Feature table from XCMS or MZmine
features <- data.frame(
  feature_id = paste0("M", sprintf("%04d", 1:2000)),
  mz = runif(2000, 50, 1200),
  rt = runif(2000, 0.5, 30),  # retention time in minutes
  S1 = rlnorm(2000, 12, 2), S2 = rlnorm(2000, 12, 2),
  S3 = rlnorm(2000, 12, 2), S4 = rlnorm(2000, 11.5, 2),
  S5 = rlnorm(2000, 11.5, 2), S6 = rlnorm(2000, 11.5, 2)
)

sample_info <- data.frame(
  sample = paste0("S", 1:6),
  group = c(rep("control", 3), rep("case", 3)),
  batch = c(1, 1, 2, 1, 2, 2)
)

lake$put("features_raw", features)
lake$put("sample_info", sample_info)
lake$snap("01_imported")
```

## Step 2: Blank Subtraction & Filtering

```r
# Remove features with low intensity
lake$ref("features_raw") |>
  dplyr::filter(
    dplyr::if_any(S1:S6, ~ . > 1000)  # At least one sample above threshold
  ) |>
  save_as("features_filtered", lake)

lake$snap("02_filtered")
```

## Step 3: Missing Value Imputation

```r
filtered <- lake$get("features_filtered")
# Replace zeros with half-minimum per feature
sample_cols <- paste0("S", 1:6)
for (col in sample_cols) {
  zeros <- filtered[[col]] == 0 | is.na(filtered[[col]])
  if (any(zeros)) {
    half_min <- min(filtered[[col]][!zeros], na.rm = TRUE) / 2
    filtered[[col]][zeros] <- half_min
  }
}

lake$put("features_imputed", filtered, depends_on = "features_filtered")
lake$snap("03_imputed")
```

## Step 4: Normalization

```r
# Log2 transformation + median centering
lake$ref("features_imputed") |>
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(S1:S6, log2)) |>
  save_as("features_log2", lake)

# Median center per sample
log_data <- lake$get("features_log2")
for (col in sample_cols) {
  log_data[[col]] <- log_data[[col]] - median(log_data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
}

lake$put("features_normalized", log_data, depends_on = "features_log2")
ol_commit(note = "Log2 transform + median centering")
lake$snap("04_normalized")
```

## Step 5: Metabolite Annotation

```r
# Match m/z to known metabolites (simplified)
library_db <- data.frame(
  metabolite = c("Glucose", "Lactate", "Pyruvate", "Citrate", "Glutamate",
                 "Alanine", "Valine", "Leucine", "Phenylalanine", "Tryptophan"),
  mz_ref = c(180.063, 89.024, 87.008, 191.019, 146.045,
             88.040, 116.071, 130.087, 164.071, 203.082),
  pathway = c("glycolysis", "glycolysis", "glycolysis", "tca_cycle", "amino_acid",
              "amino_acid", "amino_acid", "amino_acid", "amino_acid", "amino_acid")
)

lake$put("metabolite_library", library_db)

# Annotate features by m/z matching (10 ppm tolerance)
features_norm <- lake$get("features_normalized")
annotations <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:nrow(library_db), function(i) {
  tol <- library_db$mz_ref[i] * 10e-6
  matches <- features_norm[abs(features_norm$mz - library_db$mz_ref[i]) < tol, ]
  if (nrow(matches) > 0) {
    data.frame(
      feature_id = matches$feature_id,
      metabolite = library_db$metabolite[i],
      pathway = library_db$pathway[i],
      mz_error_ppm = abs(matches$mz - library_db$mz_ref[i]) / library_db$mz_ref[i] * 1e6
    )
  }
}))

lake$put("annotations", annotations,
         depends_on = c("features_normalized", "metabolite_library"))
lake$snap("05_annotated")
```

## Step 6: Statistical Analysis

```r
# t-test per feature
features_norm <- lake$get("features_normalized")
results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:nrow(features_norm), function(i) {
  ctrl <- as.numeric(features_norm[i, c("S1", "S2", "S3")])
  case <- as.numeric(features_norm[i, c("S4", "S5", "S6")])
  tt <- t.test(case, ctrl)
  data.frame(
    feature_id = features_norm$feature_id[i],
    log2fc = mean(case) - mean(ctrl),
    pvalue = tt$p.value
  )
}))
results$padj <- p.adjust(results$pvalue, method = "BH")

lake$put("stat_results", results,
         depends_on = c("features_normalized", "sample_info"))
lake$snap("06_stats")
```

## Step 7: Pathway Enrichment

```r
# Join stats with annotations
lake$ref("stat_results") |>
  dplyr::inner_join(lake$ref("annotations"), by = "feature_id") |>
  dplyr::group_by(pathway) |>
  dplyr::summarize(
    n_features = dplyr::n(),
    n_significant = sum(padj < 0.05),
    mean_log2fc = mean(log2fc),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  save_as("pathway_summary", lake)

lake$snap("07_final")
```

## Full Lineage

```r
lake$tree("pathway_summary")
# pathway_summary
#   ├── stat_results
#   │     ├── features_normalized
#   │     │     └── features_log2
#   │     │           └── features_imputed
#   │     │                 └── features_filtered
#   │     │                       └── features_raw
#   │     └── sample_info
#   └── annotations
#         ├── features_normalized (shared dependency)
#         └── metabolite_library
```

## Using MsExperiment (Optional)

```r
library(MsExperiment)

# Store the complete MS experiment object
lake$put("ms_experiment", mse)
lake$snap("mse_stored")

# After processing
lake$put("ms_processed", mse_processed, depends_on = "ms_experiment")
```

## Export

```r
lake$export("pathway_summary", "results/pathway_enrichment.parquet")
lake$export("stat_results", "results/all_metabolite_stats.parquet")
```
